meta.title: Who We Serve | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.description: Financial planning that connects your decisions, taxes, and long-term goals. Serving pre-retirees, business owners, high-income professionals, families, and more in Woodland Hills, CA.
meta.ogTitle: Who We Serve | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.ogDescription: Financial planning that connects your decisions, taxes, and long-term goals for pre-retirees, business owners, professionals, families, and more.

hero.headline: Financial Planning That Connects Your Decisions, Taxes, and Long-Term Goals
hero.subheadline: At Prosperity Planning and Advisory, financial planning is not one-size-fits-all. Every client has different priorities, challenges, and opportunities. Our approach is designed to help you make financial decisions with clarity, integrating your income, investments, taxes, and long-term goals into one coordinated strategy.
hero.heroBody: Whether you're preparing for retirement, growing a business, building wealth, or planning for your family's future, our process is built to help you move forward with purpose and confidence.

builtAroundYou.heading: Financial Planning Built Around You
builtAroundYou.body: Different stages of life and financial situations require different strategies. Below are some of the individuals and families we commonly work with.

items.label: Pre-Retirees & Retirees
items.desc: Planning the transition from savings to income

items.label: Small Business Owners
items.desc: Aligning business success with personal wealth

items.label: High-Income Professionals
items.desc: Using your income more intentionally and efficiently

items.label: Families
items.desc: Balancing today's needs with long-term goals

audiences.title: Pre-Retirees and Retirees
audiences.intro: As you approach retirement, the decisions you make now can significantly impact the next 20–30 years of your financial life.
focusedOn: Transitioning from accumulation to income
Structuring retirement income
Planning with tax implications in mind during retirement
Navigating key financial decisions during critical years
audiences.howWeHelp: We help you transition into retirement with a clear plan designed to coordinate income strategy, tax-aware withdrawal planning, and investment decisions with your long-term needs.

audiences.title: Small Business Owners
audiences.intro: As a business owner, your financial life often involves balancing business success with personal financial goals.
focusedOn: Balancing business growth with personal wealth
Managing cash flow between business and personal life
Improving tax efficiency
Preparing for a future transition or exit
audiences.howWeHelp: We help business owners align their personal and business financial strategies. Our planning incorporates tax-aware strategies that consider income, capital gains, and long-term opportunities, implemented in coordination with your CPA.
planningAreas: Personal and business cash flow alignment
Strategy Spending: a more intentional approach to cash flow and budgeting
Tax-aware planning in coordination with your CPA
Long-term business and personal wealth planning
audiences.ctaText: Learn how we work with business owners

audiences.title: High-Income Professionals
audiences.intro: With a demanding career and strong income, the challenge is often not earning more—but using what you earn more efficiently.
focusedOn: Maximizing income efficiency
Reducing tax drag on earnings and investments
Building wealth while managing limited time
Making confident financial decisions
audiences.howWeHelp: We provide structured, tax-aware planning designed to help you use your income more intentionally by coordinating investment strategy, savings, and tax considerations into a cohesive plan.
audiences.ctaText: Start building a more intentional financial strategy

audiences.title: Families
audiences.intro: Balancing your current lifestyle with long-term goals requires clarity, structure, and intentional decision-making.
focusedOn: Managing household cash flow and spending
Protecting your family financially
Planning for education and future goals
Aligning today's decisions with long-term priorities
audiences.howWeHelp: We help families create structure and clarity through Strategy Spending—guiding more intentional decisions around cash flow while integrating protection planning and long-term goal alignment.
planningAreas: Strategy Spending: a more intentional approach to cash flow and budgeting
audiences.ctaText: Start creating more clarity in your financial life

audiences.title: Tax-Aware and Legacy-Focused Clients
audiences.intro: For many clients, financial decisions are not just about growth, but also about efficiency, preservation, and long-term impact.
focusedOn: Reducing long-term tax exposure
Preserving wealth across generations
Coordinating financial, tax, and estate strategies
Making intentional legacy decisions
audiences.howWeHelp: We integrate tax-aware strategies into your broader financial plan by considering income taxes, capital gains, and long-term planning decisions. We coordinate with your CPA and estate planning attorney to help ensure alignment across your strategy.
planningAreas: Coordination with CPA and estate planning professionals

audiences.title: Clients Working with Attorneys or Referred Through Legal Professionals
audiences.intro: This is especially relevant for clients working through estate planning, trust structures, or business-related legal matters with their attorneys.
focusedOn: Aligning financial planning with legal structures
Coordinating with your attorney on broader planning needs
Making informed decisions within complex situations
audiences.howWeHelp: We provide financial planning that works alongside your legal and tax professionals, helping your financial strategy stay aligned with your broader plan without replacing the role of your attorney or CPA.
planningAreas: Coordination with legal and tax professionals
Financial planning aligned with legal structures

taxAware.heading: Tax-Aware Financial Planning
taxAware.body1: Every financial decision has potential tax implications. Our planning process incorporates tax-aware strategies with efficiency in mind over time, including considerations around income, capital gains, and long-term financial decisions.
taxAware.body2: Rather than reacting to taxes after the fact, we help incorporate tax awareness into the planning process upfront in coordination with your CPA or tax professional.

noOneCategory.heading: You Don't Have to Fit Into Just One Category
noOneCategory.body1: Most clients don't fit into just one category, which is why our planning is designed to adapt to your full financial picture.
noOneCategory.body2: Whether you're a business owner planning for retirement, a professional building wealth, or a family balancing competing priorities, your strategy is built to reflect your complete situation.

connectsEverything.heading: Planning That Connects Everything
connectsEverything.body: Your financial life is not made up of separate pieces, it's interconnected.
connectsEverything.subheading: Our approach is designed to help connect:
connectsEverything.footer: So each decision can better support the bigger picture.

closingCta.heading: Start with Clarity
closingCta.body: If any of these situations resonate with you, the next step is gaining clarity around your financial decisions.
closingCta.body2: We'll work with you to understand where you are, where you want to go, and how to build a strategy aligned with your goals.
